name: gpt-5-6-model-router
description: Enforced GPT-5.6 subagent routing with authorized overrides and verified critical review.

interface.longDescription: Require every root Agent spawn to use an enforced Luna, Terra, or Sol route prepared through the plugin, with authorized overrides, leaf-only children at depth one, pre-spawn protocol checks, and verified independent review for critical changes. Root-direct work remains unrestricted.
defaultPrompt: $setup-gpt56-model-router Install or upgrade the governed router and trust its hooks.
$route-gpt56-task Handle this task with governed cost-aware GPT-5.6 routing.
$route-gpt56-task Handle this critical change with verified independent review.
